payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Also, for those of you guys who didn't notice, tomorrow, our production team here at Critical Role Land are going to be answering fantastic questions from the community about the whole production with this crazy, zany bunch of people. It'll be tomorrow on the Critical Role subreddit at 2:00pm Pacific Time. They'll be on there live answering questions, discussing all the chaos behind the scenes that you guys have wanted to know about. This was, if you don't recall, a special incentive that was unlocked from our fantastic 826LA charity stream that we ran a few months back. Thank you for supporting 826 and making it a fantastic charity push and we're happy to bring you this next leg of that reward journey back to you. So check it out. As a reminder, next week on Thursday will not be an in-canon episode as me, Marisha, and Taliesin will be off in a dusty place. But that doesn't mean there's not going to be a game. Actually, we are going to have a one-shot next week run by our fantastic Liam O'Brien. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And on YouTube on Wednesdays. On our Crit Role YouTube.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hell yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, next Wednesday.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is the Critical Role YouTube channel called "Critical Role" or "Crit Role"?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: youtube.com/criticalrole, I believe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But if you're confused, all that information is on critrole.com

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If anyone owns criticalrole.com, message us back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Weirdly, the Hamburger Helper organization owns it. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Big Helper.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The fucking glove. The glove is like--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We've been really trying to talk to the glove.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Last we left off, The Mighty Nein, having completed their journey north and their two jobs for The Gentleman, return with a new friend, a new companion, and the memory of an old. You spent two weeks in Zadash utilizing your downtime; some to a very successful level, some at a nearly terribly not successful level, but managing to skirt by. You've taken your time, decided on a new path, a new adventure ahead of you, loaded up your things and currently with your cart, horses, and selves together. You begin making your way towards the southern area of Zadash and out towards the roads ahead. So this is your very last chance: if there's anything you need to do in the city, or forever hold your peace.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, go to the store and check out shop.critrole.com. Did I get it right? There's t-shirts, and there's a bumper sticker that says something about the Traveler, and you know we all love that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Retro tee, critter cap, Mighty Nein tee, Vox Machina pin.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dad cap!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They know what there is! And some pins, check it out. Maybe there's pins, maybe there's not. Maybe you should go check it out to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Could be anything!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the worst ARG element of our whole show's campaign. Go find out!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There might be a surprise. If there is, tell us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With that being said, let's go ahead and bring us into tonight's episode of Critical Role!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (caterwauling) [click, TV static] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And welcome back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: DTPB. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys reach the southern gates to the exterior of Zadash, with the creaking of chains and the heavy (thudding) as the large wooden barriers slowly drift open to allow you and a few other carts outward onto the main road. You glance out onto the southern hills below you in the Marrow Valley and you can see the faint dusting of distant snow that has begun to melt in the recent warmer days that have come. The roads themselves are slick and heavy with mud from the snow and rainfall that has managed to still seep in. You can hear hooves making their way through the mud as you push past the barrier. Now last time you were here, you recall seeing large numbers of military that had gathered of the Righteous Brand of which there are very few left, it looks like most have gone eastward and found their way towards the skirmishes you continue to hear about on the borders of Xhorhas and the Ashguard Garrison. The gates close behind you, and you begin making your way now free again in the Marrow Valley southward towards your destination of the Menagerie Coast. First off, who is going to be guiding this first leg of the path? That is three days of travel to Alfield along the road. Who's going to be keeping an eye out? All right, we have Caleb for that. Anybody helping Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I need to pee.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a constitution check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Too real.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do we want to raid the adult bookstore one more time? Just kidding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21. You can hold it for three more days.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay good, 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're just going to make a sloshing sound when you walk for a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb has to find new garage sales to dive through.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am all for that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's right, yeah. Which is still visible, but impenetrable. And there has not been an issue. You do wake up and notice that there maybe have been a few tracks that made their way towards your camp. They appear to be hoof-based in nature, but had wandered and circled around and made their way beyond your location. Probably just something natural in the vicinity that was curious about what this strange dome was in the space where you had made camp. But you gather your things, you make your way onto your cart, and with the better part of the next-- the third day's travel, right as the sun begins to set, you can see ahead the small treeline that surrounds the now-glowing windows of the town of Alfield.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You are not allowed to-- you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no! I wouldn't (hums). I just want to look.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can't look at it, though, today.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because he already has it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You have so many balls inside of you already.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ja, balls deep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lots of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Leave it alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know, so close!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Razor's edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, I'd like you to roll a perception check with advantage with Caduceus's aid.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for bringing it back to the material plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is pretty good. That's an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18, okay. As you progress for the first couple of days, heading south along the road, camping without issue, at the beginning of the third day, when you've begun taking your camp and reassembling it, making your way back to the road--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Point of order  there's also a hut, now, as part of the nightly routine.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you begin to go closer, you can see-- while there's still light in the sky, you can see that there are a number of building structures that have been reframed, and it looks like there was both a volunteer effort, as well as a number of hired masons and volunteers, that are in the process of rebuilding a lot of what had been damaged or burned down when the gnolls had originally assaulted it the last time you were here. By the time you reach the actual streets, making your way along the one central thoroughfare that cuts across the center of town, you can see some of the folks who are finishing up their daily work. As they're losing light, some light up torches, and continue to work and toil into the early hours of the evening. Others begin to close up, taking their ladders down, finishing for the day's work, and make their way to local tavern or homestead to make food and bed down for the evening. But as you pass by, a few folks do notice your presence, look over at the cart, and recognize you, and wave in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Back in Alfield.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Back to the beginning of our notes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is where Bryce lives, right? We should check in with Bryce.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it looking as we near it-- is it looking a little more put back together?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, we've gotten the basis of the bottom floor mostly restored structurally. We're going to try and fill in the walls, and then we'll head on to the second floor there. I surmise we probably have another four months or so before we're up and operational."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They wave and seem almost nervous, excited but both not quite sure how to act in your presence. You see one familiar halfling, who had previously lost his entire inn, who glances over in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thadeus Candleglow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn, note taker.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ten points to Gryffindor, fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He runs up, and you can see there's a lot of dust and bits of wood splinters on the shoulders and edges of the sleeves as the halfling runs up and glances over and goes, "I wasn't expecting to see y'all return. Things are going along well. We're doing what we can."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much have you built back already?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All right, let me go check," and heads back in. About a moment passes and you hear some footsteps coming and there you see coming through the doorway Bryce, helmet off, they're still wearing their armor. They look a bit overworked, maybe not getting enough sleep, a little bit of dark circles under the eyes, but other than that healthy. Their blond, shoulder-length hair has a soft curl to it, is pulled up in the back, and looks to be tied to keep out of the way. As they come through the door frame, a smile on their face. "I wasn't expecting company, let alone such welcome--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We cut off their ears and sold them for money.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What kind of gnolls, you ask? Regular.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I know what a gnoll is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you've heard of gnolls. You've never seen one, you've never encountered one, but as far as your knowledge goes, they're just nasty big dog people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sometimes they aren't regular, though-- sometimes they're undead ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Irregular gnolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. But we fought both.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Irregular ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Harder to fit in what we want to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, the guard comes back, pokes through the doorway. "May I ask who's asking?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, The Mighty Nein has come calling.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Were we called that back then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't remember.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, that's where you coined the name.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep, that's it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Just a moment. If you wouldn't mind, go ahead and let Crute know that you've arrived at the Feed & Mead tavern and I'll meet you there in an hour or so."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus. Caduceus Clay. Pleasure. You're a lot shorter than the last one they--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Bryce. Bryce Feelid."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Introduced me to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all right. Pleasure to meet you. You are very tall and... strange."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I've noticed everybody else is very short. It's fascinating.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, welcome to Alfield. Any friends of these are friends of ours."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Pleasure to make your acquaintance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. Are you passing through? Or you've come to stay for a bit?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Passing through.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe stay for the night before moving on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, of course, of course. You need not worry about finding lodging, we can have that arranged."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, wow, thank you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We've done that before, we can do it again. Well, I have a little bit more business to attend to and then I'll be off my shift and perhaps I'll join you for drinks."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Party time.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Makes his way into the kitchen to finish the meal. An hour or so passes, a couple other folks come in. Some of them don't seem to recognize you or didn't interface with you directly. A handful do and they come by and offer to buy a drink. Crute returns with some basic foods– most everything here is everything from lightly cooked vegetables or boiled vegetables to some treated and salted meats. They don't have a wide variety of dishes here, but it is still delicious and very classic home-on-the-road food. Bryce eventually comes and joins you; the first time you've seen them out of their formal attire and armor. Bryce comes in with a light blue soft tunic over some light brown leggings and comfortable boots. Very relaxed and casual as they sit down at the table and take an unclaimed tankard and leans back in the chair. "Well, I think we've all earned this. Cheers."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Came through in the black, not broken even.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No IOUs or you know--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, do you need to buy paper here or anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I am all set.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, just making sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go to the Feed and the Mead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way to the Feed & Mead. Crute recognizes you as you enter. "It's good to see all of you again. Welcome. Please, sit down. I will prepare food, I suppose, for many more than I was expecting."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: For Bryce too. They're coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good to know."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I use Thaumaturgy to open all of the windows!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (crashing) All of the windows slam open loudly. There's the sound of breaking glass on the far side as one of the windows is shattered from the impact. Wind swoops in and you watch as Crute-- who's faced away, making the way to the kitchen-- stops and goes, "(groaning)."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Memories!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "The normal recovery. Thankfully only one and a half fields were torched in the gnoll onslaught, so hasn't been a huge detriment to our farming schedule. Other than that, it's been the Righteous Brand passing through."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cheers!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To friends, here and not."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And Nott!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And Nott."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, to me. Any crazy news around here? Or just the normal stuff?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "There's one of them right over there." One of the individuals that came up and offered to buy you drinks earlier, you can see it's one of the older, bearded gentlemen who looks to be a little-- you recognize him now, once it's pointed out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cheers!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To friends, here and not."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And Nott!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And Nott."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, to me. Any crazy news around here? Or just the normal stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The normal recovery. Thankfully only one and a half fields were torched in the gnoll onslaught, so hasn't been a huge detriment to our farming schedule. Other than that, it's been the Righteous Brand passing through."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The people we rescued from that cave nearby? Are they all fine, not, you know–?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You did hear about this from one of the town criers a little over a month ago when you were leaving on The Gentleman's errand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Totally recognize him now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ey! Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ey! Told you they remembered me!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Totally know exactly what you're talking about.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They never forget a face, The Mighty Nein."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He was crying when we rescued him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was really dirty, covered in a lot of–

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Soot and dirt, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They all do, if you're not paying attention. Bryce continues on a bit and tells you about how: "There's word that the Ashguard Garrison has fallen. I've been doing the best I can to keep my ear to the ground on things happening east. It's far enough away where no one here's worried, but I have friends in Bladegarden and who were stationed at the Rockguard, which is the other garrison. If one's fallen. I worry for the other. But I know they're sending all of their forces that way and--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, when did this happen?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It's been a while."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right, he did some stuff to it. No, when it was clean, it was lovely.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Traditional Zadash breakfast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Call that the continental. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, lord.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DPB.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm feeling very prideful at the moment. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bryce at this point goes, "Well, folks, I think this is my cue to get some rest. It's been great catching up a bit with all of you. Stay safe."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You as well, yes. We wish you nothing but the best.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cheers again!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Cheers again. If ever you find your way near this podunk side of the Empire again, you'll always have a place to stay in Alfield. Heck, maybe if all this business to the east is finished before long, and I get some time off, maybe I'll come visit you up in Zadash."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should.

payload.raw_text: Yeah, the room is already provided. Your delightfully pleasant evening purveyor of down pillows and blankets, Crute, is ever eager to show you where you can leave him the fuck alone. You manage to find your rooms and rest for the evening. The following morning, you gather your things, the cart has been taken care of.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Did they say where we were going to be put up, our lodging?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Here.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Here, yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, where we are?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's easy. We stumble upstairs.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, the room is already provided. Your delightfully pleasant evening purveyor of down pillows and blankets, Crute, is ever eager to show you where you can leave him the fuck alone. You manage to find your rooms and rest for the evening. The following morning, you gather your things, the cart has been taken care of.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ew.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's also hot. Is it hot there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a bit warmer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's warmer. It's nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A little humidity, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You might not want mittens, you know?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Skin mittens.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll see how long I last.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Leave them on, you cook your fingers in some balsamic, it'll be great. Smell real nice when you pull them out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't smell good to begin with.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like a cast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You get that cast off, you're like (sniffs deeply).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're fine when you're next to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's true. Stink-ouflage.

They tend to avoid the main road at this point. Eventually, you make your way past the dry, rocky plains just as the sun begins to set. You can see to the left of you, the Ashkeeper Peaks that continue to curl off to the horizon; the hills growing taller and more scattered across the plain in front of you to where you can't see beyond the first set.
